SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am12
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.ViewModel.PropertyChangeEvents

Interface PropertyChange

All Known Implementing Classes:
PropertyCardInHand, PropertyCardPlaced, PropertyChatMessage, PropertyClassification, PropertyDeckColour, PropertyErrorMessage, PropertyGameStopped, PropertyLobbiesNonCompleted, PropertyNicknameSet, PropertyObjectivesToChoose, PropertyPlaceablePositions, PropertyPlayerColour, PropertyPlayersAdded, PropertyPlayersInMatch, PropertyPoints, PropertyPublicCard, PropertyPublicObjective, PropertyRemainingRounds, PropertySecretObjective, PropertyStateChange, PropertyTurnChange, PropertyYourTurn
public interface PropertyChange
The purpose of this interface is to notify the user interface that a change happened in the viewModel. Its implementations specify which property has changed.
